title: OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: MADRAS LATINO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers intensive outpatient treatment for alcohol and drug recovery. 236 SE D Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who identify as Hispanic or Latinx Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Outpatient treatment: By appointment only Email (541) 475-5300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-5300 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fee may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: Spanish AREA SERVED: Jefferson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Hispanic/Latino Community Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
